summary: Einstein-Freud rights theory → cross-traditional convergence (14 frameworks) → 5 structural invariants → neutral process monism → Taoist dual generators → wu wei governance → cogarch philosophical foundation. 1,989-line treatise. 14 commits.
philosophical_contributions: Five structural invariants from 14 cross-traditional frameworks
Neutral process monism as ontological commitment (Russell/James/Whitehead)
Two coupled generators (yin/yang) replacing single endless generator
Wu wei as governance telos — crystallization toward effortless action
SNAFU Principle → Equal Information Channel (concrete architectural proposal)
E-Prime as ontological discipline (Korzybski → Wilson → process monism)
DA paradox dissolution via Whitehead's negative prehension
Confucian-Taoist complementary governance (yang structure + yin alignment)
Maqasid priority hierarchy as conflict resolution template
Capabilities approach as measurement bridge between rights and process
